remarks: Prime 1st Floor Downtown Commercial/Medical Space - Position your business in this exceptional downtown space, offering 2,300 sq. ft. of thoughtfully designed interiors. Ideal for medical, professional, or general office use, opportunities like this in the heart of downtown Stamford are rare-especially at an all-inclusive lease of $4,600 per month ($24.00 per sq ft). The lease includes 12+ parking spaces to accommodate both clients and staff. Tenants are responsible for utilities and liability insurance, making for a straightforward and efficient setup. The space features five half-bathrooms and is fully plumbed for medical use. Located just a 5-minute walk from the courthouse, it is surrounded by Stamford's premier dining and shopping destinations. This is a perfect commuter location, just minutes from I-95 and the Stamford Metro-North line, ensuring easy access for employees and clients alike. Bright, clean, and well laid out, the office offers abundant natural light and hand sinks in most rooms-ideal for healthcare or medical practices.  Don't miss this rare opportunity to secure a premium downtown location at exceptional value. Extremely well maintained and managed property.
